council_actions.description: Freeze registrar queue and export registrar/dispute/state snapshots.
File interim steward motion with vote window + quorum requirements.
Publish customer FAQ + transparency log once rotation vote is opened.
Record vote outcome and schedule hand-off with replacement steward.

next_steps: Guardians freeze registrar queue and export registrar/dispute state.
File interim steward motion in the governance tracker with vote window + quorum.
Publish customer FAQ and transparency log entry once voting starts.
council_motion.summary: Freeze registrar queue, appoint an interim steward for DAO Launchpad Guild, and attach the KPI evidence bundle.
council_motion.title: Council replacement motion for .dao

dao_actions.description: Publish ratification draft referencing scorecard hash + council motion id.
Attach FAQ/freeze log to DAO register and archive vote outcome.

next_steps: Post ratification draft referencing the scorecard hash and council motion id.
Record vote outcome, attach FAQ + freeze log, and file in governance addenda.
dao_motion.summary: Ratify the steward replacement, archive the vote record, and mirror the evidence in the DAO register.
dao_motion.title: DAO ratification for .dao
